---

title: "Get chart thumbnail"

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get chart thumbnail"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/v1/chart/{pk}/thumbnail/{digest}/"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>

</MethodEndpoint>



Compute or get already computed chart thumbnail from cache.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
